# Moby/Docker Engine advisories reported through github.com/docker/docker.
# Docker Engine/Moby advisories list 29.3.1 as fixed, but the current
# github.com/docker/docker Go module path only publishes up to v28.5.2.
# Revisit when a fixed module tag is available or the client migrates to a
# fixed supported module path.
CVE-2026-34040
CVE-2026-33997
GO-2026-4887
